mapper.select: SELECT tmd.*, hr.hr_nm as writer_nm, COUNT(sf.file_id) as file_count FROM esg.tb_manage_doc tmd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_type = 'DOC' AND sf.target_id LIKE tmd.write_year || tmd.doc_no || '%' AND sf.comp_id = tmd.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hr on hr.hr_id = tmd.writer_id WHERE tmd.comp_id = #{compId} GROUP BY tmd.write_year, tmd.doc_type, tmd.doc_no, tmd.comp_id, tmd.write_dt, tmd.manage_doc_nm, tmd.created_at, tmd.created_by, tmd.updated_at, tmd.updated_by, hr.hr_nm ORDER BY tmd.use_yn DESC, tmd.doc_no DESC

SELECT tmd.*, hr.hr_nm as writer_nm, tdcd1.minor_cd as manage_doc_type, tdcd1.minor_nm as manage_doc_type_nm, sf.file_id, sf.file_nm, -- 파일 이름 가져오기 sf.file_size -- 파일 크기 가져오기 FROM esg.tb_manage_doc tmd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tdcd1 ON tdcd1.major_cd = 'C0029' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_type = 'DOC' AND sf.target_id = tmd.write_year || tmd.doc_no || tdcd1.minor_cd AND tmd.comp_id = sf.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hr on hr.hr_id = tmd.writer_id WHERE tmd.comp_id = #{compId} AND tmd.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tmd.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tmd.doc_type = #{docType} GROUP BY tmd.write_year, tmd.doc_type, tmd.doc_no, tmd.comp_id, tmd.write_dt, tmd.manage_doc_nm, tdcd1.minor_cd,tdcd1.minor_nm, tmd.created_at, tmd.created_by, tmd.updated_at, tmd.updated_by, sf.file_id, hr.hr_nm ORDER BY tmd.use_yn DESC, tmd.doc_no DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_manage_doc WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_manage_doc ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, write_dt, writer_id, manage_doc_nm, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{writeDt}, #{writerId}, #{manageDocNm}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
